variants: Diana Paz currently resides in Cloudvale Market, having been born in Cometfield Bend. She has made significant contributions to the arts, for which she was honored with the Flareborn Virtue Emblem. An accomplished author, Diana penned the notable work titled Binary Fern Crystal. Her love for poetry shines through her active membership in the Glyphweaver Poets Circle, where she connects with fellow poets who share her passion for literary expression.
